data.body: REVIEW RESULTS round 1: EPIC 2141 PASS (signed fresh attestation, blocking=0 advisory=6). STORY A a3d7 BLOCK (4 findings) — plan is STALE: story E (ba33) already landed 'audit show' CLI + read layer, so 'audit' is ALREADY a CLI intercept (src/rebar/_cli/_audit_commands.py::audit_cli, help/audit.txt exists, audit is a known subcommand). BLOCKs: (1)+(4) read-layer contract/dep not pinned [reviewer's suggested list_audited_tickets() does NOT exist — only audit_trail(ticket_id); index must enumerate itself], (2) CLI 'fresh intercept / no help.txt / no known_subcommands' claim contradicts live code, (3) config.py re-exports each class explicitly (not 'every class'; IdentityConfig not re-exported) so must add explicit 'from rebar._config_schema import UiConfig as UiConfig'. STORY F ff6f review DID NOT COMPLETE (0 bytes; the nohup bg run was killed). Plan: remediate story A description (add ## Dependencies, fix CLI+config sections, add --port + strengthen AC2 refusal-message + port AC), re-review A; also re-run F review fresh then remediate. Note: another agent is concurrently running 'review-plan trogonoid-browny-blowfish' from the MAIN checkout — shared tracker, watch for contention.
